reviews.comment:
Situada a la altura de San Pedro, Bs As, ideal para hacer un alto, descansar y reabastecerse. Muy buena atención, estacionamiento, lugar familiar y apacible.

(Translated by Google)
Located near San Pedro, Buenos Aires, it's ideal for a stop, a rest, and a refuel. Excellent service, parking, and a peaceful, family-friendly atmosphere.
